version_description: Mr. Cross recorded this song using Open D. This version uses standard tuning with chords meant to show the movement of the treble part. The chord names say/show exactly which strings are played without resorting to tabbing the whole song. (If you want to give Open D a try, see the Tab version called "Sailing Acoustic".).

versions.version_description: This version contains many sus chords with the root notes.
Https://youtu.be/MEO6gYCFbr0 Complete aligned lyrics and sequence. Version especially for mediocre players.
Based on YouTube link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MEO6gYCFbr0 with Strings Intro, Guitar Arpeggios written as chords, the right Bass Notes (often after a slash symbol).
Uses guitar voicings that more closely mimic the piano chords of the actual recording.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
UNUSUAL CHORDS used in this version
[ch]C[/ch]            x320xx
[ch]C6[/ch]           x322xx
[ch]Cmaj7[/ch]        x324xx
[ch]Em[/ch]           x220xx ([ch]Em/B[/ch])
[ch]Esus4[/ch]        x222xx ([ch]Esus4/B[/ch])
[ch]E5[/ch]           x224xx ([ch]E5/B[/ch])
[ch]G[/ch]            3200xx
[ch]Gadd9[/ch]        3202xx
[tab][ch]G[/ch]*           3204xx
F#           2xxxxx (single note)[/tab]
* Alternate voicing

[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Cadd2[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]C6[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C6[/ch]  [ch]C6[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]C6[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]C6[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]C6[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
Well, it's not far down to paradise, at least it's not for me[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]Esus4[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Esus4[/ch]
And if the wind is right you can sail away and find tranquility[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C6[/ch]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]     [ch]C6[/ch]                [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Oh, the canvas can do miracles, just you wait and see[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]*  [ch]Gadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]*
Believe me[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
It's not far to never-never land, no reason to pretend[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]Esus4[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Esus4[/ch]
And if the wind is right you can find the joy of innocence again[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C6[/ch]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]     [ch]C6[/ch]                [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Oh, the canvas can do miracles, just you wait and see[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]*  [ch]Gadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]*
Believe me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]*           [ch]Gadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]*                [ch]C[/ch]
Sail - ing takes me away to where I've always heard it could be[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
Just a dream and the wind to carry me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]C/G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
And soon I will be free[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Gadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]*              [ch]Gadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]*
Fanta - sy, it gets the best of me[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F#[/ch]   [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]E5[/ch]  [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]E5[/ch]
When  I'm  sail - ing[/tab]
[tab][ch]C6[/ch]                   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]    [ch]C6[/ch]              [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
All caught up in the reverie, every word is a symphony[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gadd9[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]*    [ch]Gadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]*
Won't you believe me?[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]*           [ch]Gadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]*                [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
Just a dream and the wind to carry me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]C/G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]

[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Gb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
Well it's not far back to sanity, at least it's not for me[/tab]
